root_cause.explanation: The footer status text function getNostlingStatusTextThemed() only considers message queue state and does not consume relay connection status. Even though relay status is tracked in the renderer (main.tsx setRelayStatus state), this information is never passed to the footer status text generation logic.
sequence: Relay disconnects, backend detects it via WebSocket connection drop
Renderer receives event and updates relayStatus state in main.tsx
Footer renders with nostlingStatus from getNostlingStatusTextThemed(hasBridge, queueSummary)
getNostlingStatusTextThemed() has no relayStatus parameter, returns idle/synced message
User sees 'Preening peacefully' despite all relays being disconnected

evidence.description: Function signature only accepts hasBridge and queueSummary, no relayStatus parameter
relayStatus state exists and is tracked via setRelayStatus
Footer receives nostlingStatus but not relayStatus
nostlingStatusText computed without relayStatus in dependencies

changes.change: Add optional relayStatus parameter of type Record<string, string> | undefined. Add relay disconnection check as priority 4.5 (after queued, before synced). When relayStatus is provided and ALL relay values are not 'connected', return randomSelect(config.nostlingQueueStates.offline).
changes.reason: This is the root cause - the function needs to know about relay status to display disconnection state. Relay disconnection should be higher priority than idle/synced (user needs to know they're offline) but lower priority than errors/sending/queued (active operations take precedence).

changes.change: 1) Import relayStatus from main.tsx context or add relayStatus to the hook's state. 2) Pass relayStatus to getNostlingStatusTextThemed() in nostlingStatusText useMemo. 3) Add relayStatus to useMemo dependencies.
changes.reason: The hook needs access to relayStatus to pass it to getNostlingStatusTextThemed(). This wires the existing tracked state into the status text computation.

invariants.api_contracts: All existing call sites of getNostlingStatusTextThemed must continue to work - relayStatus parameter is OPTIONAL (defaults to undefined, no change in behavior when omitted). Footer component signature unchanged. QueueSummary type unchanged.
invariants.existing_behavior: All priority levels (bridge unavailable, errors, sending, queued, synced, idle) produce identical output as before when relayStatus is not provided or when at least one relay is connected. Themed message selection remains random within category. useMemo dependency optimization preserved.
invariants.performance: No degradation - relayStatus is already tracked in state, just passing existing object. Simple Object.values().every() check adds negligible overhead.
invariants.backward_compatibility: Optional parameter preserves backward compatibility. All existing tests pass. Only new behavior is when relayStatus provided AND all relays disconnected.

fix_approach: 1) Add optional relayStatus?: Record<string, string> parameter to getNostlingStatusTextThemed(). 2) After bridge check, add relay disconnection check: if relayStatus provided and Object.values(relayStatus).every(s => s !== 'connected'), return offline themed message. 3) In useNostlingState, receive relayStatus from props or context. 4) Pass relayStatus to getNostlingStatusTextThemed in nostlingStatusText useMemo. 5) Add relayStatus to useMemo dependencies (or specific relay connection state hash to prevent random message re-selection).
constraints: No refactoring - only add relay status awareness to existing status text logic
No optimizations beyond fix - preserve existing themed message system
No features - do not add reconnecting state, colored dots, or visual indicators beyond text
Exact behavior preservation - all existing status priority levels and message selection unchanged when relayStatus omitted or relays connected
No changes to Footer component signature - continue passing nostlingStatus as string
No changes to themed-messages.json - use existing 'offline' messages
Do not modify RelayTable or relay management - only footer status text

similar_patterns_fixed: None - this is the only footer status text generation function

verification_criteria: Bug reproduction test PASSES - first test in bug-footer-missing-relay-status.test.ts compiles and passes
All baseline tests pass (124 suites, 2823+ tests) - no regressions
Manual verification in dual-instance environment: stop relay, footer shows offline-themed message within 15 seconds
Manual verification: restart relay, footer returns to idle/synced message within 15 seconds
Manual verification: when sending message while disconnected, footer shows 'queued' message (higher priority than disconnection)
All existing getNostlingStatusTextThemed tests in state.themed.test.ts still pass
